values: Tutor-facing authoring template for the app's existing schemaVersion 1.0 JSON importer.
Set status to draft while authoring, published when ready.
At least one code is required.
Codes are normalized case-insensitively by the app.
Question marks must add to totalMarks.
Use stable questionId values such as q1, q2.
Part marks must add to their parent question marks.
Choose part type, response kind, and marking mode from dropdowns.
See Compatibility for which tabs each feature needs.
Fix mismatches before converting to JSON.
The server importer remains the source of truth.

preview: Set status to draft while authoring, published when ready.
At least one code is required.
Codes are normalized case-insensitively by the app.
Question marks must add to totalMarks.
Use stable questionId values such as q1, q2.
Part marks must add to their parent question marks.
Choose part type, response kind, and marking mode from dropdowns.

values: One paper-level record. Values in column B are the source cells for schema v1 metadata.
Stable unique id. Re-importing the same id creates a new version.
Use published only when students should see it.
Must equal the sum of marks in Questions.

preview: Stable unique id. Re-importing the same id creates a new version.

values: One row per code that should unlock this paper.
One row per parent question. Part rows link back using questionId.
Required positive integer. Must equal linked part marks.

preview: Required positive integer. Must equal linked part marks.

values: One row per answerable part. Use the compatibility sheet to choose valid response/marking combinations.
Usually same as type; required for choices/output/error correction.
Optional for rubric_ai; if present must equal marks.
Question-level or part-level stimulus. Tables and flowcharts use their own detail tabs.
For table stimuli, pipe-separated headers, e.g. Part|Program.
Text/code/expected output body. Multi-line is okay.
Optional for flowchart source image reference.
Options for single_choice and multiple_choice parts.
Rows for table stimuli. The headers live in Stimuli.columnsPipe.
Rows shown to students for code_output_table response parts.
Accepted answers for exact marking. Use repeated rows for alternatives.
Required accepted answer. For multi-select, use semicolon-separated values in sorted order.
Optional coercion hint: text, number, boolean.

preview: Required accepted answer. For multi-select, use semicolon-separated values in...
Optional coercion hint: text, number, boolean.

values: Expected outputs and row marks for code_output_table marking.
Optional; defaults to 1 in JSON if blank.

preview: Optional; defaults to 1 in JSON if blank.

values: Expected line number and accepted corrected lines for error_correction marking.
Required accepted corrected line. Repeat rows for alternatives.
Optional. If used, line + correction marks must equal part marks.
Optional. If used, line + correction marks must equal part marks.

preview: Required accepted corrected line. Repeat rows for alternatives.
Optional. If used, line + correction marks must equal part marks.
Optional. If used, line + correction marks must equal part marks.

values: Rubric points for rubric_ai marking. Use one row per point.
Optional positive integer; use blank if not point-scored.

preview: Optional positive integer; use blank if not point-scored.

values: Friendly checks for common schema v1 authoring errors. Server validation still has final say.
Use this as the dropdown/hints map while filling the authoring tabs.
Choices, Exact Answers or Rubric Points
single_choice parts must provide choice options.
Choices, Exact Answers or Rubric Points
For exact multi-select answers, use semicolon-separated sorted values.
Use responseLines for answer box height.
Response Rows, Code Output Marks, Stimuli
Row marks must add to part marks.
Optional line/correction marks must add to part marks.
Use flowchart stimulus rows when rendering a flowchart.
Use responseLanguage for the expected code language.
Use for scenario text or source material.
Pipe-separated headers map to each row's col1..col8.
Use for visible expected-output style stimulus, not marking.
Edges must reference node ids from the same stimulus.
Row marks default to 1 and must add to part marks.
If line/correction marks are provided, their sum must equal part marks.
Parts.modelAnswer and Rubric Points; optional Parts.maxScore
maxScore, if provided, must equal part marks.

Use for visible expected-output style stimulus, not marking.
Row marks default to 1 and must add to part marks.
If line/correction marks are provided, their sum must equal part marks.
Parts.modelAnswer and Rubric Points; optional Parts.maxScore

values: Dropdown source values for schema v1. Edit only if the importer schema changes.
